untranslatable_reason: The pattern requires analysis of a 5-candle sequence with specific gap logic between candle bodies and position of the 5th candle's close relative to the first two candles' bodies. This multi-bar relational logic (comparing body positions across 5 candles, identifying gaps between bodies while ignoring shadows, and validating close position between two specific prior candle bodies) cannot be expressed using the available indicators and single-bar operators. The allowed indicators do not support multi-candle pattern matching, historical body comparisons, or relative positioning constraints needed to fully validate this specific breakaway candle pattern.
translation_notes: Signal requires: (1) 5-candle pattern validation, (2) gap between bodies of candles 1-2 (excluding shadows), (3) candle 5 close between bodies of candles 1-2. These constraints require multi-candle relative comparisons and body positioning logic not supported by available indicators. A complete implementation would need custom pattern recognition functions beyond the allowed operator set.
